stderr 'elements/signal/script.* requires --use-datastar'

-- template.gohtml --
{{- define "GET /events Stream(ctx, elements)" -}}{{- .Result -}}{{- end -}}
-- go.mod --
module server

go 1.25
-- server.go --
package server

import (
	"context"
	"embed"
	"html/template"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var templatesFS embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templatesFS, "*"))

type Server struct{}

func (Server) Stream(ctx context.Context, elements func(data string) error) {
	_ = elements("hi")
}
